checks.description: HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) must be enabled.
Stack tracing must be disabled.
The shutdown port must be disabled.
DefaultServlet debug parameter must be disabled.
DefaultServlet directory listings parameter must be disabled.
Autodeploy must be disabled.
xpoweredBy attribute must be disabled.
Example applications must be removed.

check.command: sh -c 'grep -Eis "Apache Software Foundation|Apache Tomcat|Tomcat server|Tomcat default" "$CATALINA_BASE/webapps/ROOT/index.jsp" "$CATALINA_BASE/webapps/ROOT/RELEASE-NOTES.txt" 2>/dev/null'

checks.description: Tomcat default ROOT web application must be removed.
Documentation must be removed.

check.command:
sh -c 'base=${CATALINA_BASE:-/opt/tomcat}; if [ ! -e "$base/webapps/manager" ] && [ ! -e "$base/webapps/host-manager" ]; then printf Compliant; exit 0; fi; python3 - <<"PY"
import pathlib, re, os
base=os.environ.get("CATALINA_BASE") or "/opt/tomcat"
p=pathlib.Path(base)/"conf"/"server.xml"
text=p.read_text(errors="ignore") if p.exists() else ""
text=re.sub(r"<!--.*?-->", "", text, flags=re.S)
print("Compliant" if re.search(r"<\s*Realm\b[^>]*\bclassName\s*=\s*['\"][^'\"]*JNDIRealm\b", text, re.I) else "")
PY'

checks.description: Tomcat management applications must use LDAP realm authentication.

check.command: sh -c 'grep -i -- "-Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.authenticate=false" /etc/systemd/system/tomcat.service 2>/dev/null || ps -ef | grep -i -- "-Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.authenticate=false" | grep -v grep || true'

checks.description: JMX authentication must be secured.

check.command: sh -c 'grep -i -- "-Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.ssl=false" /etc/systemd/system/tomcat.service 2>/dev/null || ps -ef | grep -i -- "-Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.ssl=false" | grep -v grep || true'

checks.description: TLS must be enabled on JMX.
LDAP authentication must be secured.

check.command: sh -c 'set -eu; cfg="$CATALINA_BASE/conf/server.xml"; path=$(grep -Eio "keystoreFile[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*\"[^\"]+\"" "$cfg" | head -n1 | sed -E "s/.*=\"([^\"]+)\"/\\1/I"); [ -n "$path" ] && [ -f "$path" ] || exit 0; case "$path" in "$CATALINA_BASE"/*|"${CATALINA_HOME:-$CATALINA_BASE}"/*|/opt/tomcat/*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; [ "$(stat -c "%a %U %G" "$path")" = "640 root tomcat" ] && printf Compliant'

checks.description: Keystore file must be protected.

check.command: sh -c "grep -Eiq 'FIPSMode[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*\"on\"' \"$CATALINA_BASE/conf/server.xml\" && ! grep -Eiq 'failed to set property\\[FIPSMODE\\] to \\[on\\]' \"$CATALINA_BASE/logs/catalina.out\" && printf Compliant"

checks.description: Tomcat must use FIPS-validated ciphers on secured connectors.
Tomcat must be configured to limit data exposure between applications.
ErrorReportValve showServerInfo must be set to false.

check.command: sh -c 'base="${CATALINA_BASE:-/opt/tomcat}"/webapps/manager/WEB-INF/jsp; for f in 401.jsp 402.jsp 403.jsp; do [ -f "$base/$f" ] && grep -Ein "tomcat-users\.xml|manager-(gui|script|jmx|status)|<role[[:space:]]+rolename|<user[[:space:]]+username" "$base/$f"; done'

checks.description: Default error pages for manager application must be customized.
ErrorReportValve showReport must be set to false.

check.command: sh -c 'for f in "$CATALINA_BASE/webapps/manager/META-INF/web.xml" "$CATALINA_BASE/conf/web.xml"; do [ -f "$f" ] && grep -Eiq "<session-timeout>[[:space:]]*10[[:space:]]*</session-timeout>" "$f" && printf Compliant && exit 0; done; [ ! -e "$CATALINA_BASE/webapps/manager" ] && printf Compliant'

checks.description: Idle timeout for the management application must be set to 10 minutes.
LockOutRealms must be used for management of Tomcat.
LockOutRealms failureCount attribute must be set to 5 failed logins for admin users.
LockOutRealms lockOutTime attribute must be set to 600 seconds (10 minutes) for admin users.
Tomcat user account must be set to nologin.

check.command: sh -c 'pids=$(pgrep -f "org.apache.catalina|catalina" 2>/dev/null || true); [ -n "$pids" ] || exit 0; for pid in $pids; do set -- $(grep "^Uid:" /proc/$pid/status 2>/dev/null || echo Uid: 0); uid=$2; [ "$uid" != 0 ] || exit 1; done; printf Compliant'

checks.description: Tomcat user account must be a non-privileged user.

check.command: sh -c "p=\"${CATALINA_BASE:-/opt/tomcat}/conf/server.xml\"; total=$(xmllint --xpath \"count(//Valve[contains(@className,'AccessLogValve')])\" \"$p\" 2>/dev/null || printf 0); bad=$(xmllint --xpath \"count(//Valve[contains(@className,'AccessLogValve') and not(contains(@pattern,'%u'))])\" \"$p\" 2>/dev/null || printf 1); [ \"$total\" != \"0\" ] && [ \"$bad\" = \"0\" ] && printf Compliant"

checks.description: Application user name must be logged.
$CATALINA_HOME folder must be owned by the root user, group tomcat.
$CATALINA_BASE/conf/ folder must be owned by root,  group tomcat.
$CATALINA_BASE/logs/ folder must be owned by tomcat user, group tomcat.
$CATALINA_BASE/temp/ folder must be owned by tomcat user, group tomcat.
$CATALINA_BASE/temp folder permissions must be set to 750.
$CATALINA_BASE/work/ folder must be owned by tomcat user, group tomcat.

check.command: sh -c 'p="${CATALINA_BASE:-/opt/tomcat}/webapps/manager/WEB-INF/web.xml"; test ! -e "$p" && printf Compliant && exit 0; v=$(xmllint --xpath "string(translate(//login-config/auth-method, \'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz\', \'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ\'))" "$p" 2>/dev/null); [ "$v" = CLIENT-CERT ] && printf Compliant'

checks.description: Multifactor certificate-based tokens (CAC) must be used when accessing the management interface.
AccessLogValve must be configured for Catalina engine.
Changes to $CATALINA_HOME/bin/ folder must be logged.
Changes to $CATALINA_BASE/conf/ folder must be logged.
Changes to $CATALINA_HOME/lib/ folder must be logged.
STRICT_SERVLET_COMPLIANCE must be set to true.
RECYCLE_FACADES must be set to true.
ALLOW_BACKSLASH must be set to false.
ENFORCE_ENCODING_IN_GET_WRITER must be set to true.
